irozuke-api v1.0.0
# Colorize a manga panel via API
$ curl https://api.irozuke.ai/v1/colorize \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_KEY" \
-F "file=@panel.jpg" \
-F "model=gans"
# Response
{"status": "coming_soon", "eta": "Q3 2026"_}

IROZUKE ENGINE v2.4

NEURAL
COLOR
MODELS

Three specialized AI engines. One seamless colorization pipeline.

100K+Training Panels 8msAvg Inference
01GAN

GANs — Manga V2

Manga-Colorization-V2 GAN — sharp line preservation, manga-native training, works on any B&W scan.

Manga-Native No Bleed Fast
02STYLE

STYLIZE — DeOldify

AnimeColorDeOldify U-Net trained on 3M+ Danbooru panels — rich painterly colors for any manga style.

Danbooru-Trained Painterly Any Manga
03SEG

SEGMENT

ViT masks — foreground/background split for layered control.

Depth Map Mask Layer BG Split
◀ DRAG TO COMPARE B&W vs COLOR ▶
COLORIZED OUTPUT
B & W SOURCE
⇔
LIVE MODEL STATS

TYPICAL OUTPUT PALETTE

High contrast, neutral tones with sharp ink blacks

ARCHITECTURE DEEP DIVE CLICK TO EXPAND
Architecture

U-Net Generator with PatchGAN discriminator. 128-layer depth with skip connections preserving fine linework at pixel level.

Training Data

64,000 manga panel pairs across Shonen, Seinen & Josei. Augmented with 18k synthetic B&W/color pairs for edge cases.

Best For

Action sequences, battle panels, high-contrast scenes. Excels when clean line integrity matters above all.

Architecture

SD 2.1 backbone with custom manga LoRA. Cross-attention layers retrained on 40k colored manga pages for palette consistency.

Training Data

40,000 colored manga pages across 200+ series. Palette-locked training prevents color drift across 50+ panels in a single run.

Best For

Full chapter colorization. Ideal for consistent hair, skin, and clothing colors that don't shift between panels.

Architecture

ViT-B/16 encoder with custom segmentation head. Produces pixel-accurate character masks, background layers, and depth maps per panel.

Training Data

22,000 manually annotated panels with semantic masks. 14 object classes: character, speech bubble, effect lines, background zones.

Best For

Complex multi-character scenes. Use when you want full artistic control — color foreground and background independently.
